H2: Yard Sign FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Signs

Professional Quality Corrugated Plastic Signs for Business, Real Estate & Events

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Material: 4mm Corrugated Plastic Printing: Single-Sided or Double-Sided Stakes: Wire Stakes Available Design Upload: PDF, AI, EPS, PNG, JPG Quantity Discounts Available Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Custom Yard Signs for Every Need

Create high-impact custom yard signs printed on durable 4mm corrugated plastic. Perfect for real estate agents, political campaigns, business promotions, and special events. Our weather-resistant yard signs feature vibrant CMYK printing with UV and fade-resistant inks that maintain their appearance outdoors. See also [bulk order stickers](https://www.decals.com/bulk-order-stickers).

Choose from popular sizes including 12" x 18" and 18" x 24", or select custom dimensions up to 48" x 96". Available in single-sided or double-sided printing with optional wire stakes for easy ground installation. Our bulk order options provide significant savings for large campaigns or multiple property listings.

Key Features of Our Yard Signs

Each yard sign is manufactured from lightweight yet durable corrugated plastic with hollow flutes that provide strength while remaining easy to transport and install. The material resists weather damage and can be reused multiple times when properly stored between uses.

Available with corner grommets for alternative display methods, or choose traditional wire stakes in multiple lengths (10" x 15", 10" x 24", 10" x 30", and heavy-duty 27" Beefy Stakes) to accommodate different ground conditions and display heights.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Yard Signs

Ordering professional yard signs is simple through our streamlined design and approval process. Start by selecting your preferred size, quantity, and printing options, then upload your artwork or use our design templates specifically created for real estate, political, and business applications.

Design Process

Upload your completed design files or work with our in-house graphic design team to create professional yard sign layouts. We offer business-specific templates for real estate agents, political candidates, contractors, and service providers. Our design system accommodates both single-sided and double-sided printing layouts.

Proof Approval

Every custom yard sign order includes a digital proof for your review and approval before production begins. This ensures your design, colors, and text appear exactly as intended. Make any necessary revisions during the proof stage to guarantee satisfaction with your finished signs.

Order Tracking

Track your yard sign order status in real-time through our proprietary live order tracking system. Receive updates when your order enters production, completes printing, and ships from our facility.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Standard production time for custom yard signs is three business days after proof approval. This timeline covers printing, finishing, and packaging but does not include shipping time to your location.

Standard Production

Most yard sign orders complete production within three business days of approved artwork. This includes time for printing on our commercial-grade equipment, quality inspection, and preparation for shipment.

Rush Production Options

Expedited production is available for urgent campaigns or tight deadlines. Rush processing reduces standard production time while maintaining our quality standards for color accuracy and material durability.

Proof Approval Timeline

Production begins only after you approve the digital proof of your yard signs. Factor in proof review time when planning your timeline, especially for time-sensitive political campaigns or event promotions.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Cutting & Finishing Options

All custom yard signs are precision cut to your specified dimensions using commercial cutting equipment. Standard rectangular cuts are included, while specialty finishing options enhance functionality and display versatility.

Standard Rectangle Cutting

Yard signs are cut to exact rectangular dimensions with clean, straight edges. Popular sizes include 12" x 18" for compact displays and 18" x 24" for maximum visibility. Custom sizes available up to 48" x 96" for special applications.

Corner Grommet Options

Add corner grommets to your yard signs for alternative mounting and display methods. Grommets allow hanging from fences, posts, or temporary structures when ground stakes are not suitable for your location.

Double-Sided Printing Considerations

Double-sided yard signs require careful handling during storage and transport. We recommend placing cloth or protective material between signs to prevent surface scratching and maintain print quality for repeated use.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Yard Sign Printing

Submit print-ready artwork files to ensure optimal results for your custom yard signs. Our printing process uses CMYK color profiles optimized for outdoor visibility and color accuracy on corrugated plastic substrates.

Preferred File Formats

Vector formats (PDF, AI, EPS) provide the best results for text and simple graphics on yard signs. These formats maintain crisp edges at any size and ensure consistent color reproduction across large print runs.

Raster Image Requirements

When using raster images (PNG, JPG, TIFF), maintain minimum 300 DPI resolution at final print size. Higher resolution ensures photo quality and prevents pixelation when viewed up close.

Color and Design Guidelines

Design with high contrast between text and background colors for maximum readability from a distance. Bold fonts and simple layouts work best for yard sign applications where quick recognition is essential.

Bleed and Safety Areas

Include 0.125" bleed area around all edges of your design to account for cutting tolerances. Keep important text and graphics at least 0.25" from trim edges to ensure they appear properly on finished yard signs.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Shipping & Delivery Options

Yard signs ship flat in protective packaging to prevent damage during transit. Shipping time is separate from our three-day production timeline and varies based on your location and selected shipping method.

Shipping Methods Available

Choose from standard ground shipping for cost-effective delivery or expedited air shipping for urgent orders. Large quantities may ship via freight carrier for optimal protection and cost efficiency.

Packaging and Protection

Each yard sign order is carefully packaged with protective materials to prevent bending, scratching, or moisture damage. Double-sided signs receive additional protection between printed surfaces.

Delivery Timeline Expectations

Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on distance from our Minnesota facility. Expedited shipping reduces delivery time to 1-3 business days for most locations across the United States.

Order Tracking Information

Receive tracking information immediately when your yard signs ship. Monitor delivery progress and plan installation timing using carrier-provided delivery estimates and real-time location updates.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Installation & Setup Guide

Installing yard signs is straightforward with the proper stakes and technique. Our wire stakes insert directly into the corrugated plastic flutes and provide secure ground anchoring for most soil conditions and weather.

Installing Wire Stakes

Insert wire stakes through the corrugated plastic flutes at your desired height. Push stakes firmly into the ground, ensuring equal depth on both sides for level sign display. Choose stake length based on soil conditions and desired sign height above ground.

Alternative Display Methods

Use corner grommets to hang yard signs from existing fences, posts, or temporary structures. This method works well for locations where ground installation is not possible or when signs need frequent relocation.

Positioning for Maximum Visibility

Place yard signs perpendicular to traffic flow for best visibility. Consider sight lines, local regulations, and property boundaries when selecting installation locations. Ensure signs are visible from the primary viewing direction without obstruction.

Weather Considerations

While yard signs are weather-resistant, their lightweight design makes them susceptible to strong winds. In high-wind areas, consider additional anchoring methods or temporary removal during severe weather to prevent damage or loss.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Yard Signs?

Yard signs are lightweight promotional signs made from corrugated plastic that are typically installed using wire stakes pushed into the ground. These versatile signs feature hollow flutes that provide structural strength while keeping weight minimal for easy transport and installation. Yard signs are commonly used by real estate agents, political candidates, service businesses, and event organizers for temporary outdoor advertising that delivers high visibility at ground level.

Order Professional Yard Signs for Your Campaign

Get started with custom yard signs that make your message stand out. Our professional printing on durable corrugated plastic ensures your signs maintain their appearance throughout extended outdoor display periods. With quantity discounts available and fast three-day production, you can order confidently for political campaigns, real estate marketing, or business promotions.

Upload your design today or choose from our extensive template library featuring layouts optimized for real estate, political, contractor, and service business applications. Our clear stickers and rounded corner labels complement yard sign campaigns with additional promotional materials.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign FAQs

How long do yard signs last outdoors?

Yard signs made from 4mm corrugated plastic typically last 6-12 months outdoors with proper care. The UV and fade-resistant inks maintain color vibrancy, while the corrugated plastic material resists weather damage when not subjected to extreme conditions.

What sizes work best for yard sign visibility?

The most effective yard sign sizes are 18" x 24" for maximum visibility and 12" x 18" for compact installations. These dimensions provide optimal text readability from typical viewing distances while remaining cost-effective for large campaigns.

Can yard signs be reused for multiple campaigns?

Yes, yard signs can be reused multiple times when stored properly between uses. Store signs flat in a dry area with consistent temperature, and place protective material between double-sided signs to prevent surface scratching.

What file format works best for yard sign artwork?

Vector formats like PDF, AI, and EPS provide the best results for yard signs because they maintain crisp text and graphics at any size. For designs with photos, use high-resolution raster files at 300 DPI minimum.

Do you offer stakes with yard sign orders?

Yes, we offer various wire stake options including 10" x 15", 10" x 24", 10" x 30", and heavy-duty 27" Beefy Stakes. Stakes are sold separately and can be ordered with your signs or from our accessories page.

Can yard signs be printed on both sides?

Custom yard signs can be printed double-sided for maximum message impact. Double-sided printing works well for signs viewed from multiple directions or when different messages are needed on each side.

Are yard signs effective for small business advertising?

Yard signs are highly effective for local service businesses like lawn care, daycare, contractors, and home services. They provide cost-effective visibility in target neighborhoods and can be easily relocated to follow completed projects or service areas.
